rust-dev.description: Primary agent for Rust development. Build, test, lint, and refactor Rust code with cargo fmt/clippy enforcement.

git-workflow.description: Dedicated agent for Git operations: commit messages, branching, rebasing, changelog management.

glab-cli.description: Specialized agent for GitLab API operations via the glab CLI: issues, MRs, pipelines, runners, releases.

gh-cli.description: Specialized agent for GitHub API operations via the gh CLI: issues, PRs, actions, releases, notifications.

src.description: Rust source code for glab-tui. Use for understanding patterns, architecture, and implementation details.

docs.description: Project documentation, README, and config templates.
